overall_summary: Driver is 7.000s slower than reference. Biggest loss is in Sector 1 (+5.403s), driven by 9.5 km/h corner speed deficit. Correcting identified issues could recover approximately 3.06s.

priority_actions.issue: Apex speed 35.6 km/h below reference (93.2 vs 128.9 km/h).
priority_actions.instruction: Carry more speed through apex — target 129 km/h. Widen entry for a later apex and maximise exit speed.

priority_actions.issue: Apex speed 23.2 km/h below reference (126.3 vs 149.5 km/h).
priority_actions.instruction: Braking too early and shedding too much speed. Delay brake point and commit to a later apex. Reference carries 150 km/h here.

priority_actions.issue: Apex speed 18.3 km/h below reference (104.6 vs 123.0 km/h).
priority_actions.instruction: Braking too early and shedding too much speed. Delay brake point and commit to a later apex. Reference carries 123 km/h here.
Move brake point 90m later. Reference at 720m, driver at 630m.

priority_actions.issue: Apex speed 10.4 km/h below reference (84.7 vs 95.1 km/h).

priority_actions.issue: Apex speed 7.4 km/h below reference (47.0 vs 54.4 km/h).
priority_actions.instruction: Despite late braking, apex speed is low — car not rotating. Use higher initial brake pressure to pitch the car in, trail off through apex to hit 54 km/h.

sector_feedback.headline: Minimum corner speed is 9.5 km/h below reference — driver is over-slowing significantly.
